summary: Herion Iteration 14 Testing Complete - Italian Email Template System. 24/24 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. Template system with 34 templates in 9 groups, placeholder resolution, live preview, and full draft→review→approve→send flow working.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option>. This is a minor console warning that doesn't affect functionality (same as iteration 13).

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: EmailCenterPage.jsx line 446 - option element contains dynamic content that causes React hydration warning. Consider using plain text instead of JSX expressions inside option tags.
seed_data_creation: Multiple email drafts created during testing from various templates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested the new Italian Email Template System. All 24 backend tests pass. Template system features: GET /api/emails/templates (returns 34 templates with id, group, name, placeholders, user_types), GET /api/emails/template-groups (returns 9 groups with counts), GET /api/emails/templates/{id} (single template detail), POST /api/emails/templates/{id}/resolve (resolves placeholders from practice data, returns unresolved_placeholders list), POST /api/emails/draft-from-template (creates draft with template-resolved content, tracks template_id and template_name). Frontend has tab switcher ('Da Template' / 'Manuale'), group selector with 9 groups, template picker with 34 templates, practice/recipient fields, live preview with resolved HTML, unresolved placeholders section with override inputs, and 'Crea Bozza da Template' button. Template-created drafts have email_type='template' and show template_name badge in list. Full draft→review→approve→send flow works for template drafts.

details: Each template has id, group, group_label, name, subject, placeholders, user_types
Returns 9 groups: private (5), freelancer (5), company (5), blocked (6), approval (3), delegation (4), delivery (3), reminder (1), account (2)
Each group has id, label, count
Returns single template with full details including body_html
Unresolved placeholders remain visible as [placeholder] in output
Accepts extra overrides to fill unresolved placeholders
Draft has email_type='template', template_id, template_name, template_group
Template-created drafts appear in drafts list
Template-created drafts can be submitted for review
Template-created drafts can be sent (full flow works)

features_verified: Tab switcher between 'Da Template' and 'Manuale' modes
Group selector with 9 groups and counts (Tutti shows 34)
Template picker shows templates with names and group labels
Practice selector + recipient email fields appear after template selection
Live preview renders resolved HTML email with populated placeholders
Unresolved placeholders show override inputs in amber section
'Crea Bozza da Template' button creates draft and refreshes list
Manual flow still works (practice, recipient, subject, body, create)
Email list shows template name badge on template-created drafts
Draft → Review → Approve → Send actions work on template-created drafts
